title: Welcome to University of Southampton Delhi for New Students
text: Welcome to the university We are excited to welcome our first students to the university. Complete these steps to join our community and start your studies. We hope that you are as excited as we are for you to become part of the only Global Top 100 university here in India.As part of our first cohort, you have shown true spirit, incredible tenacity and a genuine confidence in your future. You are one of the first students in the country with the courage to transform your future with a new style of education. You can be proud to be remembered in history as an educational trailblazer.
summary: University of Southampton Delhi welcomes its first cohort of students, highlighting their pioneering spirit and the institution's global top 100 ranking.

title: Important University Onboarding Steps and Key Dates
text: We want to make your journey to University of Southampton Delhi as smooth as possible. Over the next few weeks, we will ask you to complete a number of important steps to join our community:-Set up IT account between 20-22 August 2025.Verify your documents between 22-24 August 2025.Check in to student hostel from 23 August 2025 onwards.Enrol at the university between 27-29 August 2025.Collect your student ID card on Friday 29 August 2025.Student induction and support week from 25-29 August 2025.Careers and employer week from 01-05 September 2025.Pay tuition fees by 08 September 2025.We will provide more detail on these steps over the next few days, and our expert staff will be on hand to guide you through them. It is important that you complete these tasks before teaching starts on campus on 08 September 2025.
summary: This section outlines critical onboarding steps and their deadlines for new students joining University of Southampton Delhi, ensuring a smooth start.

title: Setting Up Your University IT Account
text: Set up IT account You must set up your IT account to access the university's IT systems. See more about set up
summary: New students must set up their IT account to access University of Southampton Delhi's essential IT systems and services.

title: Document Verification for University Admission
text: Verify your documents You should have original documents verified so that we can check you meet the requirements of your offer letter. See more about verification
summary: Students need to present original documents for verification to ensure they meet the requirements of their offer letter.

title: Student Hostel Check-in Information
text: Check in to student hostel If you have booked accommodation, you must check in before you travel to the accommodation or move into your room. See more about check in
summary: Students who have booked accommodation must check into the student hostel prior to arrival or moving into their assigned room.

title: Official University Enrolment Process
text: Enrol at the university You must officially enrol to join the university as a student. See more about enrolment
summary: To become an official student, it is mandatory to complete the university's enrolment process.

title: Collecting Your Student Identification Card
text: Collect your student ID card You must have a student ID card to access campus and identify you as a member of the student community. See more about collection
summary: Students must collect their ID card to gain access to campus facilities and for identification as a university community member.

title: Student Induction and Support Week Program
text: Student induction and support week Prepare to 'hit the ground running' with support and advice from professional and academic teams. Sessions take place on campus from 25-29 August 2025. See more about induction week
summary: The induction week, held from August 25-29, 2025, prepares new students with essential support and advice from academic and professional teams.

title: Careers and Employer Week for Student Readiness
text: Careers and employer week Get advice from employers and our careers team on being career-ready while you study. Sessions take place on campus from 01-05 September 2025. See more about careers week
summary: From September 1-5, 2025, students can get career readiness advice from employers and the university's careers team.

title: Tuition Fee Payment Information
text: Pay tuition fees You must pay the next instalment of your tuition fees before the academic term starts. Make a payment
summary: The next tuition fee installment must be paid before the academic term commences on September 8, 2025.

title: Academic Term Commencement Date and Timetable
text: Academic term starts Seminars and lectures start from Monday 08 September 2025. Check your timetable so you know where and when.
summary: Seminars and lectures for the academic term officially begin on Monday, September 8, 2025; students should check their timetables.
